item.title:

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 9min Quick snapshot of the top Tackles in the draft and how they measure up with other players drafted
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 9min Quick snapshot of the top Tackles in the draft and how they measure up with other players drafted over the last 20+ years. Markel Bell with 98th percentile arms but 1st percentile hands is nothing that is comparable in the database. Odd 2 2 910
